{+      const next = new Set(prev)+}
{+      if (next.has(label)) next.delete(label); else next.add(label)+}
{+      return next+}
{+    })+}
  }

  const isActive = (href: string) => pathname === href || pathname?.startsWith(href + '/')

  return (
    <aside className={cn(
      [-'bg-gray-800-]{+'bg-surface+} border-r [-border-gray-700-]{+border-edge+} flex flex-col shrink-0 transition-all duration-200 overflow-hidden',
      collapsed ? 'w-16' : 'w-60',
    )}>
      <nav className="flex-1 py-2 overflow-y-auto">
        {navigation.map((item) => {
          const Icon = item.icon
          const active = item.href ? isActive(item.href) : item.children?.some(c => isActive(c.href))
          const isExpanded = expanded.has(item.label)

          if (item.href) {
            return (
              <Link key={item.label} href={item.href}
                className={cn('flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 text-sm transition-colors',
                  active ? [-'bg-gray-700 text-emerald-400-]{+'bg-raised text-accent+} font-medium' : [-'text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-700/50 hover:text-gray-50')}>-]{+'text-secondary hover:bg-raised/50 hover:text-primary')}>+}
                <Icon size={18} className="shrink-0" />
                {!collapsed && <span className="truncate">{item.label}</span>}
              </Link>
            )
          }

          return (
            <div key={item.label}>
              <button onClick={() => toggle(item.label)}
                className={cn('w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 text-sm transition-colors',
                  active ? [-'text-emerald-400'-]{+'text-accent'+} : [-'text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-700/50 hover:text-gray-50')}>-]{+'text-secondary hover:bg-raised/50 hover:text-primary')}>+}
                <Icon size={18} className="shrink-0" />
                {!collapsed && (
                  <>
                    <span className="flex-1 text-left truncate">{item.label}</span>
                    <ChevronDown size={14} className={cn('transition-transform', isExpanded && 'rotate-180')} />
                  </>
                )}
              </button>
              {!collapsed && isExpanded && item.children && (
                <div className="ml-7 border-l [-border-gray-700">-]{+border-edge">+}
                  {item.children.map(child => (
                    <Link key={child.href} href={child.href}
                      className={cn('block pl-4 py-1.5 text-xs transition-colors',
                        isActive(child.href) ? [-'text-emerald-400-]{+'text-accent+} font-medium' : [-'text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-200')}>-]{+'text-secondary hover:text-primary')}>+}
                      {child.label}
                    </Link>
                  ))}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          )
        })}
      </nav>
    </aside>
  )
}
diff --git a/src/components/shared/DataTable.tsx b/src/components/shared/DataTable.tsx
index 87aece1..51b5b44 100644
--- a/src/components/shared/DataTable.tsx
+++ b/src/components/shared/DataTable.tsx
@@ -1,191 +1,191 @@
'use client'

import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from 'react'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils/cn'

export interface ColumnDef<T> {
  id: string
  header: string
  accessorKey?: keyof T
  cell?: (row: T) => React.ReactNode
  sortable?: boolean
  width?: string
  align?: 'left' | 'center' | 'right'
  hideOnMobile?: boolean
}

export interface DataTableProps<T> {
  columns: ColumnDef<T>[]
  data: T[]
  searchable?: boolean
  searchPlaceholder?: string
  onSearch?: (query: string) => void
  pagination?: { page: number; pageSize: number; total: number; onPageChange: (page: number) => void; onPageSizeChange?: (size: number) => void }
  sortable?: boolean
  onSort?: (column: string, direction: 'asc' | 'desc') => void
  currentSort?: { column: string; direction: 'asc' | 'desc' }
  selectable?: boolean
  onSelectionChange?: (selectedIds: string[]) => void
  loading?: boolean
  emptyMessage?: string
  emptyAction?: { label: string; onClick: () => void }
  toolbar?: React.ReactNode
  onRowClick?: (row: T) => void
  rowClassName?: (row: T) => string
  stickyHeader?: boolean
  getRowId?: (row: T) => string
}

export function DataTable<T>({
  columns, data, searchable, searchPlaceholder = 'Search...', onSearch,
  pagination, onSort, currentSort, selectable, onSelectionChange,
  loading, emptyMessage = 'No data found', emptyAction, toolbar,
  onRowClick, rowClassName, stickyHeader, getRowId,
}: DataTableProps<T>) {
  const [search, setSearch] = useState('')
  const [selected, setSelected] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set())
  const timerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(null)

  const handleSearch = (value: string) => {
    setSearch(value)
    if (timerRef.current) clearTimeout(timerRef.current)
    timerRef.current = setTimeout(() => onSearch?.(value), 300)
  }

  const toggleSelect = (id: string) => {
    const next = new Set(selected)
    if (next.has(id)) next.delete(id); else next.add(id)
    setSelected(next)
    onSelectionChange?.(Array.from(next))
  }

  const toggleAll = () => {
    if (selected.size === data.length) {
      setSelected(new Set())
      onSelectionChange?.([])
    } else {
      const all = new Set(data.map((r, i) => getRowId?.(r) ?? String(i)))
      setSelected(all)
      onSelectionChange?.(Array.from(all))
    }
  }

  const handleSort = (colId: string) => {
    if (!onSort) return
    const dir = currentSort?.column === colId && currentSort.direction === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc'
    onSort(colId, dir)
  }

  const totalPages = pagination ? Math.ceil(pagination.total / pagination.pageSize) : 0
  const alignClass = { left: 'text-left', center: 'text-center', right: 'text-right' }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-3">
      {/* Toolbar row */}
      {(searchable || toolbar) && (
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
          {searchable && (
            <input type="text" value={search} onChange={(e) => handleSearch(e.target.value)}
              placeholder={searchPlaceholder}
              className="h-9 px-3 [-bg-gray-800-]{+bg-surface+} border [-border-gray-700-]{+border-edge+} rounded-lg text-sm [-text-gray-50 placeholder-gray-500-]{+text-primary placeholder:text-muted+} w-64 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 [-focus:ring-emerald-500"-]{+focus:ring-accent"+} />
          )}
          {toolbar && <div className="flex-1 flex items-center gap-2">{toolbar}</div>}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Table */}
      <div [-className="bg-gray-800-]{+className="bg-surface+} rounded-xl border [-border-gray-700-]{+border-edge+} overflow-hidden">
        <div className="overflow-x-auto">
          <table className="w-full text-sm">
            <thead>
              <tr className={cn('border-b [-border-gray-700 text-gray-400-]{+border-edge text-secondary+} text-xs uppercase', stickyHeader && 'sticky top-0 [-bg-gray-800-]{+bg-surface+} z-10')}>
                {selectable && (
                  <th className="w-10 px-3 py-3"><input type="checkbox" checked={data.length > 0 && selected.size === data.length} onChange={toggleAll} className="rounded [-border-gray-600"-]{+border-edge-strong"+} /></th>
                )}
                {columns.map((col) => (
                  <th key={col.id} className={cn('px-4 py-3', alignClass[col.align ?? 'left'], col.width, col.hideOnMobile && 'hidden md:table-cell',
                    col.sortable && onSort && 'cursor-pointer [-hover:text-gray-300')}-]{+hover:text-secondary')}+}
                    onClick={() => col.sortable && handleSort(col.id)}>
                    <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
                      {col.header}
                      {currentSort?.column === col.id && (
                        <span [-className="text-emerald-400">{currentSort.direction-]{+className="text-accent">{currentSort.direction+} === 'asc' ? '↑' : '↓'}</span>
                      )}
                    </span>
                  </th>
                ))}
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {loading ? (
                Array.from({ length: 5 }).map((_, i) => (
                  <tr key={i} className="border-b [-border-gray-700/50">-]{+border-edge/50">+}
                    {selectable && <td className="px-3 py-3"><div className="h-4 w-4 [-bg-gray-700-]{+bg-raised+} rounded animate-pulse" /></td>}
                    {columns.map((col) => (
                      <td key={col.id} className={cn('px-4 py-3', col.hideOnMobile && 'hidden md:table-cell')}>
                        <div className="h-4 [-bg-gray-700-]{+bg-raised+} rounded animate-pulse" style={{ width: `${40 + Math.random() * 40}%` }} />
                      </td>
                    ))}
                  </tr>
                ))
              ) : data.length === 0 ? (
                <tr>
                  <td colSpan={columns.length + (selectable ? 1 : 0)} className="text-center py-12">
                    <p [-className="text-gray-500-]{+className="text-muted+} mb-2">{emptyMessage}</p>
                    {emptyAction && (
                      <button onClick={emptyAction.onClick} className="text-sm [-text-emerald-400 hover:text-emerald-300">{emptyAction.label}</button>-]{+text-accent hover:text-accent">{emptyAction.label}</button>+}
                    )}
                  </td>
                </tr>
              ) : (
                data.map((row, i) => {
                  const rowId = getRowId?.(row) ?? String(i)
                  return (
                    <tr key={rowId}
                      onClick={() => onRowClick?.(row)}
                      className={cn('border-b [-border-gray-700/50-]{+border-edge/50+} transition-colors',
                        onRowClick && 'cursor-pointer [-hover:bg-gray-700/30',-]{+hover:bg-raised/30',+}
                        rowClassName?.(row))}>
                      {selectable && (
                        <td className="px-3 py-2.5" onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}>
                          <input type="checkbox" checked={selected.has(rowId)} onChange={() => toggleSelect(rowId)} className="rounded [-border-gray-600"-]{+border-edge-strong"+} />
                        </td>
                      )}
                      {columns.map((col) => (
                        <td key={col.id} className={cn('px-4 py-2.5', alignClass[col.align ?? 'left'], col.hideOnMobile && 'hidden md:table-cell')}>
                          {col.cell ? col.cell(row) : col.accessorKey ? String((row as Record<string, unknown>)[col.accessorKey as string] ?? '') : ''}
                        </td>
                      ))}
                    </tr>
                  )
                })
              )}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>

        {/* Pagination */}
        {pagination && totalPages > 1 && (
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 border-t [-border-gray-700">-]{+border-edge">+}
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs [-text-gray-400">-]{+text-secondary">+}
              <span>{pagination.total} total</span>
              {pagination.onPageSizeChange && (
                <select value={pagination.pageSize} onChange={(e) => pagination.onPageSizeChange?.(Number(e.target.value))}
                  [-className="bg-gray-900-]{+className="bg-bg+} border [-border-gray-700-]{+border-edge+} rounded px-1 py-0.5 [-text-gray-300">-]{+text-secondary">+}
                  {[25, 50, 100].map((s) => <option key={s} value={s}>{s}/page</option>)}
                </select>
              )}
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
              <button onClick={() => pagination.onPageChange(Math.max(1, pagination.page - 1))} disabled={pagination.page <= 1}
                className="px-2 py-1 text-xs [-bg-gray-700 text-gray-300-]{+bg-raised text-secondary+} rounded disabled:opacity-40">Prev</button>
              <span className="px-2 py-1 text-xs [-text-gray-400">{pagination.page}-]{+text-secondary">{pagination.page}+} / {totalPages}</span>
              <button onClick={() => pagination.onPageChange(Math.min(totalPages, pagination.page + 1))} disabled={pagination.page >= totalPages}
                className="px-2 py-1 text-xs [-bg-gray-700 text-gray-300-]{+bg-raised text-secondary+} rounded disabled:opacity-40">Next</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

index ccf2259..812fe5f 100644
--- a/src/components/terminal/CategoryGrid.tsx

'use client'

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'

interface Category {
  id: string
  name: string
  slug: string
  master_category: string | null
  sort_order: number
}

const CATEGORY_COLORS: Record<string, string> = {
  Flower: [-'bg-green-700',-]{+'bg-success',+}
  'Pre-Rolls': 'bg-lime-700',
  Cartridges: 'bg-sky-700',
  Disposables: 'bg-cyan-700',
  Concentrates: [-'bg-purple-700',-]{+'bg-info',+}
  Edibles: 'bg-orange-700',
  Topicals: 'bg-pink-700',
  Kief: 'bg-yellow-700',
  'Moon Rocks': 'bg-indigo-700',
  Oral: 'bg-rose-700',
  Accessories: [-'bg-gray-600',-]{+'bg-raised',+}
  Glass: [-'bg-slate-600',-]{+'bg-raised',+}
  'Wraps/Papers': [-'bg-stone-600',-]{+'bg-raised',+}
  Beverages: [-'bg-amber-700',-]{+'bg-warning',+}
}

function getCategoryColor(masterCategory: string | null): string {
  if (!masterCategory) return [-'bg-gray-700'-]{+'bg-raised'+}
  return CATEGORY_COLORS[masterCategory] ?? [-'bg-gray-700'-]{+'bg-raised'+}
}

interface CategoryGridProps {
  onSelect: (category: Category) => void
}

export default function CategoryGrid({ onSelect }: CategoryGridProps) {
  const [categories, setCategories] = useState<Category[]>([])
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true)

  useEffect(() => {
    fetch('/api/categories')
      .then((res) => res.json())
      .then((data) => setCategories(data.categories ?? []))
      .catch(() => {})
      .finally(() => setIsLoading(false))
  }, [])

  if (isLoading) {
    return (
      <div className="grid grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5 xl:grid-cols-6 gap-2">
        {Array.from({ length: 12 }).map((_, i) => (
          <div key={i} className="h-20 rounded-xl [-bg-gray-800-]{+bg-surface+} animate-pulse" />
        ))}
      </div>
    )
  }

  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5 xl:grid-cols-6 gap-2">
      {categories.map((cat) => (
        <button
          key={cat.id}
          onClick={() => onSelect(cat)}
          className={`${getCategoryColor(cat.master_category)} h-20 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center px-2 text-center transition-all hover:brightness-110 active:scale-[0.97]`}
        >
          <span [-className="text-white-]{+className="text-primary+} text-xs font-medium leading-tight line-clamp-2">
            {cat.name}
          </span>
        </button>
      ))}
    </div>
  )
}

'use client'

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'

// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
type Order = any

const STATUS_COLORS: Record<string, string> = {
  pending: 'bg-yellow-600', confirmed: [-'bg-blue-600',-]{+'bg-info',+} preparing: [-'bg-purple-600',-]{+'bg-info',+} ready: [-'bg-emerald-600',-]{+'bg-accent',+}
}

const NEXT_STATUS: Record<string, string> = {
  pending: 'confirmed', confirmed: 'preparing', preparing: 'ready',
}

export default function OrderQueue({ locationId }: { locationId: string }) {
  const [orders, setOrders] = useState<Order[]>([])
  const [selectedId, setSelectedId] = useState<string | null>(null)
  const {+[now] = useState(() => Date.now())+}
{++}
{+  const+} fetchOrders = () => {
    fetch(`/api/orders?location_id=${locationId}`)
      .then(r => r.json())
      .then(d => setOrders((d.orders ?? []).filter((o: Order) => ['pending', 'confirmed', 'preparing', 'ready'].includes(o.status))))
  }

  useEffect(() => { fetchOrders(); const iv = setInterval(fetchOrders, 15000); return () => clearInterval(iv) }, [locationId])

  const advanceStatus = async (orderId: string, currentStatus: string) => {
    const next = NEXT_STATUS[currentStatus]
    if (!next) return
    await fetch(`/api/orders/${orderId}`, { method: 'PATCH', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ status: next }) })
    fetchOrders()
  }[-const now = Date.now()-]

  return (
    <div [-className="bg-gray-800-]{+className="bg-surface+} rounded-xl border [-border-gray-700-]{+border-edge+} p-4">
      <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold [-text-gray-300-]{+text-secondary+} uppercase mb-3">Online Orders ({orders.length})</h3>

      {orders.length === 0 ? (
        <p [-className="text-gray-500-]{+className="text-muted+} text-sm">No active orders</p>
      ) : (
        <div className="space-y-2 max-h-80 overflow-y-auto">
          {orders.map((o: Order) => {
            const pickupMs = new Date(o.pickup_time).getTime() - now
            const urgency = pickupMs < 0 ? [-'border-red-500'-]{+'border-danger'+} : pickupMs < 30 * 60000 ? 'border-yellow-500' : [-'border-gray-700'-]{+'border-edge'+}
            const nextStatus = NEXT_STATUS[o.status]

            return (
              <div key={o.id} className={`border rounded-lg p-3 ${urgency}`}>
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <span className={`text-[10px] font-bold px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded [-text-white-]{+text-primary+} ${STATUS_COLORS[o.status] ?? [-'bg-gray-600'}`}>-]{+'bg-raised'}`}>+}
                      {o.status.toUpperCase()}
                    </span>
                    <span className="text-sm [-text-gray-50-]{+text-primary+} font-medium">{o.customer_name}</span>
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-xs [-text-gray-400">-]{+text-secondary">+}
                    {new Date(o.pickup_time).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: 'numeric', minute: '2-digit' })}
                  </span>
                </div>
                <p className="text-xs [-text-gray-400">{o.customer_phone}</p>-]{+text-secondary">{o.customer_phone}</p>+}
                {nextStatus && (
                  <button onClick={() => advanceStatus(o.id, o.status)}
                    className="mt-2 text-xs px-2 py-1 [-bg-emerald-600 text-white-]{+bg-accent text-primary+} rounded [-hover:bg-emerald-500-]{+hover:bg-accent+} transition-colors">
                    Mark {nextStatus}
                  </button>
                )}
              </div>
            )
          })}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}

'use client'

import { useState } from 'react'
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation'
import { useOnlineCart } from '@/stores/onlineCartStore'

function fmt(n: number) { return n.toLocaleString('en-US', { style: 'currency', currency: 'USD' }) }

function getPickupTimes() {
  const times: string[] = []
  const now = new Date()
  const start = new Date(now.getTime() + 30 * 60000)
  start.setMinutes(Math.ceil(start.getMinutes() / 15) * 15, 0, 0)
  for (let i = 0; i < 16; i++) {
    const t = new Date(start.getTime() + i * 15 * 60000)
    if (t.getHours() >= 21) break
    times.push(t.toISOString())
  }
  return times
}

export default function CheckoutPage() {
  const router = useRouter()
  const { items, locationId, subtotal, estimatedTax, estimatedTotal, clear } = useOnlineCart()
  const [name, setName] = useState('')
  const [phone, setPhone] = useState('')
  const [email, setEmail] = useState('')
  const [pickupTime, setPickupTime] = useState('')
  const [notes, setNotes] = useState('')
  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false)
  const [error, setError] = useState('')

  const pickupTimes = getPickupTimes()

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault()
    if (!name || !phone || !pickupTime || items.length === 0) { setError('Please fill in all required fields'); return }
    setSubmitting(true); setError('')

    const res = await fetch('/api/orders', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        location_id: locationId,
        customer_name: name,
        customer_phone: phone,
        customer_email: email || null,
        pickup_time: pickupTime,
        items: items.map((i) => ({ product_id: i.product_id, quantity: i.quantity })),
        notes: notes || null,
        order_type: 'pickup',
      }),
    })

    if (res.ok) {
      const data = await res.json()
      clear()
      [-router.push(`/order/${data.order.id}`)-]{+router.push(`/order/${data.order.id}#${data.cancellation_token}`)+}
    } else {
      const data = await res.json()
      setError(data.error ?? 'Failed to place order')
    }
    setSubmitting(false)
  }

  const inputCls = "w-full h-11 px-4 border rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 [-focus:ring-emerald-500"-]{+focus:ring-accent"+}

  return (
    <div className="max-w-lg mx-auto px-4 py-8">
      <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-6">Checkout</h1>

      <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
        <div>
          <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-1">Name *</label>
          <input value={name} onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value)} className={inputCls} required />
        </div>
        <div>
          <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-1">Phone *</label>
          <input type="tel" value={phone} onChange={(e) => setPhone(e.target.value)} className={inputCls} required />
        </div>
        <div>
          <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-1">Email</label>
          <input type="email" value={email} onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)} className={inputCls} />
        </div>
        <div>
          <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-1">Pickup Time *</label>
          <select value={pickupTime} onChange={(e) => setPickupTime(e.target.value)} className={inputCls} required>
            <option value="">Select a time...</option>
            {pickupTimes.map((t) => (
              <option key={t} value={t}>{new Date(t).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: 'numeric', minute: '2-digit' })}</option>
            ))}
          </select>
        </div>
        <div>
          <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-1">Notes</label>
          <textarea value={notes} onChange={(e) => setNotes(e.target.value)} className={inputCls + ' h-20'} />
        </div>

        <div className="border-t pt-4 space-y-1 text-sm">
          <div className="flex justify-between"><span>{items.length} items</span><span className="tabular-nums">{fmt(subtotal)}</span></div>
          <div className="flex justify-between [-text-gray-500"><span>Est.-]{+text-muted"><span>Est.+} Tax</span><span className="tabular-nums">{fmt(estimatedTax)}</span></div>
          <div className="flex justify-between font-bold text-lg"><span>Est. Total</span><span className="tabular-nums">{fmt(estimatedTotal)}</span></div>
          <p className="text-xs [-text-gray-500-]{+text-muted+} mt-1">Payment is collected at pickup. Final total may vary.</p>
        </div>

        {error && <p [-className="text-red-600-]{+className="text-danger+} text-sm">{error}</p>}

        <button type="submit" disabled={submitting || items.length === 0}
          className="w-full py-3 [-bg-emerald-600 text-white-]{+bg-accent text-primary+} rounded-lg font-medium [-hover:bg-emerald-500-]{+hover:bg-accent+} disabled:opacity-50 transition-colors">
          {submitting ? 'Placing Order...' : 'Place Order'}
        </button>
      </form>
    </div>
  )
}

        <div className="fixed inset-0 [-bg-black/60-]{+bg-bg/60+} z-50 flex items-center justify-center">
          <div [-className="bg-gray-800-]{+className="bg-surface+} border [-border-gray-700-]{+border-edge+} rounded-2xl w-full max-w-sm p-6">
            <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold [-text-gray-50-]{+text-primary+} mb-2">Clear this sale?</h3>
            <p className="text-sm [-text-gray-400-]{+text-secondary+} mb-6">All items will be removed from the cart.</p>
            <div className="flex gap-2 justify-end">
              <button onClick={() => setShowClearConfirm(false)} className="px-4 py-2 [-bg-gray-700 text-gray-300-]{+bg-raised text-secondary+} rounded-lg text-sm">Cancel</button>
              <button onClick={confirmClear} className="px-4 py-2 [-bg-red-600 text-white-]{+bg-danger text-primary+} rounded-lg text-sm [-hover:bg-red-500">Clear-]{+hover:bg-danger">Clear+} Sale</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Held Carts Panel */}
      {showHeldCarts && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 [-bg-black/60-]{+bg-bg/60+} z-50 flex items-center justify-center">
          <div [-className="bg-gray-800-]{+className="bg-surface+} border [-border-gray-700-]{+border-edge+} rounded-2xl w-full max-w-md p-6">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
              <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold [-text-gray-50">Held-]{+text-primary">Held+} Sales ({heldCarts.length})</h3>
              <button onClick={() => setShowHeldCarts(false)} [-className="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-200">&#10005;</button>-]{+className="text-secondary hover:text-primary">&#10005;</button>+}
            </div>
            {heldCarts.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-sm [-text-gray-500-]{+text-muted+} text-center py-4">No held sales</p>
            ) : (
              <ul className="space-y-2 max-h-80 overflow-y-auto">
                {heldCarts.map((held) => {
                  const age = getHeldAge(held.heldAt)
                  const isOld = [-(Date.now()-]{+(now+} - new Date(held.heldAt).getTime()) > 120 * 60000
                  return (
                    <li key={held.id} [-className={`bg-gray-900-]{+className={`bg-bg+} rounded-lg p-3 ${isOld ? 'border [-border-amber-600'-]{+border-warning'+} : 'border [-border-gray-700'}`}>-]{+border-edge'}`}>+}
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
                        <span className="text-sm [-text-gray-50">{held.customerName-]{+text-primary">{held.customerName+} ?? 'Walk-in'}</span>
                        <span className={`text-xs ${isOld ? [-'text-amber-400'-]{+'text-warning'+} : [-'text-gray-500'}`}>{age}-]{+'text-muted'}`}>{age}+} ago</span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
                        <span className="text-xs [-text-gray-400">{held.itemCount}-]{+text-secondary">{held.itemCount}+} items &middot; {held.heldBy}</span>
                        <span className="text-sm [-text-gray-50-]{+text-primary+} font-medium tabular-nums">{fmt(held.total)}</span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex gap-2">
                        <button onClick={() => handleResume(held.id)} className="flex-1 h-8 [-bg-emerald-600 text-white-]{+bg-accent text-primary+} text-xs rounded-lg [-hover:bg-emerald-500">Resume</button>-]{+hover:bg-accent">Resume</button>+}
                        <button onClick={() => deleteHeldCart(held.id)} className="h-8 px-3 [-bg-gray-700 text-gray-400-]{+bg-raised text-secondary+} text-xs rounded-lg [-hover:text-red-400">Delete</button>-]{+hover:text-danger">Delete</button>+}
                      </div>
                    </li>
                  )
                })}
              </ul>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Open Drawer Dialog */}
      {showOpenDrawer && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 [-bg-black/60-]{+bg-bg/60+} z-50 flex items-center justify-center">
          <div [-className="bg-gray-800-]{+className="bg-surface+} border [-border-gray-700-]{+border-edge+} rounded-2xl w-full max-w-sm p-6">
            <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold [-text-gray-50-]{+text-primary+} mb-2">Open Cash Drawer</h3>
            <p className="text-sm [-text-gray-400-]{+text-secondary+} mb-4">Enter the opening amount to start selling.</p>
            <label className="block mb-4">
              <span className="text-xs [-text-gray-400">Opening-]{+text-secondary">Opening+} Amount ($)</span>
              <input
                type="number" step="0.01" value={drawerAmount}
                onChange={e => setDrawerAmount(e.target.value)}
                className="w-full h-12 px-3 [-bg-gray-900-]{+bg-bg+} border [-border-gray-600-]{+border-edge-strong+} rounded-lg [-text-gray-50-]{+text-primary+} text-lg text-center tabular-nums focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 [-focus:ring-emerald-500"-]{+focus:ring-accent"+}
              />
            </label>
            <div className="flex gap-2 justify-end">
              <button onClick={() => setShowOpenDrawer(false)} className="px-4 py-2 [-bg-gray-700 text-gray-300-]{+bg-raised text-secondary+} rounded-lg text-sm">Cancel</button>
              <button
                onClick={async () => {
                  if (session) {
                    await openDrawer(parseFloat(drawerAmount) || 200, session.locationId, session.employeeId)
                  }
                  setShowOpenDrawer(false)
                }}
                className="px-4 py-2 [-bg-emerald-600 text-white-]{+bg-accent text-primary+} rounded-lg text-sm [-hover:bg-emerald-500"-]{+hover:bg-accent"+}
              >Open Drawer</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Toast */}
      {toast && (
        <div className="absolute top-4 right-4 [-bg-emerald-600 text-white-]{+bg-accent text-primary+} text-sm px-4 py-2 rounded-lg shadow-lg z-50">
          {toast}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ── A. Cart Header ── */}
      <div className="shrink-0 h-12 border-b [-border-gray-800-]{+border-edge+} px-4 flex items-center justify-between">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <span className="text-sm font-semibold [-text-gray-300">Current-]{+text-secondary">Current+} Sale</span>
          {items.length > 0 && (
            <span [-className="bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-400-]{+className="bg-accent/15 text-accent+} text-xs font-mono px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">
              {items.length}
            </span>
          )}
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          {heldCarts.length > 0 && (
            <button
              onClick={() => setShowHeldCarts(true)}
              className="text-xs [-text-amber-400 bg-amber-400/10-]{+text-warning bg-warning/10+} px-2 py-1 rounded-lg [-hover:bg-amber-400/20-]{+hover:bg-warning/20+} transition-colors"
            >
              Held {heldCarts.length}
            </button>
          )}
          {items.length > 0 && (
            <button
              onClick={clearCart}
              className="text-xs [-text-gray-600 hover:text-red-400-]{+text-muted hover:text-danger+} transition-colors"
            >
              Clear
            </button>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* ── B. Customer Section ── */}
      <div className="shrink-0 border-b [-border-gray-800">-]{+border-edge">+}
        {customerId ? (
          <div className="px-4 py-2.5">
            <CustomerBadge onViewProfile={() => setShowProfile(true)} />
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center gap-2">
            <svg className="w-4 h-4 [-text-gray-600-]{+text-muted+} shrink-0" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth={1.5}>
              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M15.75 6a3.75 3.75 0 1 1-7.5 0 3.75 3.75 0 0 1 7.5 0ZM4.501 20.118a7.5 7.5 0 0 1 14.998 0A17.933 17.933 0 0 1 12 21.75c-2.676 0-5.216-.584-7.499-1.632Z" />
            </svg>
            <span className="text-sm [-text-gray-500-]{+text-muted+} flex-1">Walk-in Customer</span>
            <button
              onClick={() => setShowSearch(true)}
              className="text-xs [-text-emerald-400 hover:text-emerald-300-]{+text-accent hover:text-accent+} transition-colors"
            >
              Assign
            </button>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* ── C. Cart Items ── */}
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
        {items.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full gap-3">
            <svg className="w-10 h-10 [-text-gray-700"-]{+text-muted"+} fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth={1}>
              <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M2.25 3h1.386c.51 0 .955.343 1.087.835l.383 1.437M7.5 14.25a3 3 0 0 0-3 3h15.75m-12.75-3h11.218c1.121-2.3 2.1-4.684 2.924-7.138a60.114 60.114 0 0 0-16.536-1.84M7.5 14.25 5.106 5.272M6 20.25a.75.75 0 1 1-1.5 0 .75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0Zm12.75 0a.75.75 0 1 1-1.5 0 .75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0Z" />
            </svg>
            <span className="text-sm [-text-gray-600">Cart-]{+text-muted">Cart+} is empty</span>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div>
            {items.map((item) => (
              <div key={item.id} className="px-4 py-3 border-b [-border-gray-800/60-]{+border-edge/60+} relative">
                {/* Row 1: Name + Remove */}
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-6 mb-1.5">
                  <p className="text-sm [-text-gray-200-]{+text-primary+} truncate flex-1">{item.productName}</p>
                  <button
                    onClick={() => removeItem(item.id)}
                    className="w-5 h-5 flex items-center justify-center [-text-gray-600 hover:text-red-400-]{+text-muted hover:text-danger+} transition-colors shrink-0"
                  >
                    <svg className="w-3.5 h-3.5" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth={2}>
                      <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M6 18 18 6M6 6l12 12" />
                    </svg>
                  </button>
                </div>
                {/* Row 2: Qty controls + Line total */}
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-0.5">
                    <button
                      onClick={() => updateQuantity(item.id, item.quantity - 1)}
                      className="w-7 h-7 rounded-lg [-bg-gray-800-]{+bg-surface+} border [-border-gray-700 text-gray-300 hover:border-gray-600-]{+border-edge text-secondary hover:border-edge-strong+} flex items-center justify-center text-xs transition-colors"
                    >
                      &#8722;
                    </button>
                    <span className="text-sm font-mono [-text-gray-100-]{+text-primary+} w-8 text-center">{item.quantity}</span>
                    <button
                      onClick={() => updateQuantity(item.id, item.quantity + 1)}
                      className="w-7 h-7 rounded-lg [-bg-gray-800-]{+bg-surface+} border [-border-gray-700 text-gray-300 hover:border-gray-600-]{+border-edge text-secondary hover:border-edge-strong+} flex items-center justify-center text-xs transition-colors"
                    >
                      +
                    </button>
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-right">
                    {item.discountAmount > 0 ? (
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <span className="text-sm [-text-gray-600-]{+text-muted+} line-through tabular-nums font-mono">
                          {fmt(item.unitPrice * item.quantity)}
                        </span>
                        <span className="text-sm font-semibold [-text-emerald-400-]{+text-accent+} tabular-nums font-mono">
                          {fmt((item.unitPrice - item.discountAmount) * item.quantity)}
                        </span>
                      </div>
                    ) : (
                      <span className="text-sm font-semibold [-text-gray-100-]{+text-primary+} tabular-nums font-mono">
                        {fmt(item.unitPrice * item.quantity)}
                      </span>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* ── D. Applied Discounts ── */}
      {discountResult && discountResult.applied_discounts.length > 0 && (
        <div className="shrink-0">
          {discountResult.applied_discounts.map((d) => (
            <div key={d.discount_id} className="px-4 py-1.5 flex justify-between text-xs">
              <span [-className="text-emerald-400-]{+className="text-accent+} truncate flex items-center gap-1.5">
                <svg className="w-3 h-3 shrink-0" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth={2}>
                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M9.568 3H5.25A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 3 5.25v4.318c0 .597.237 1.17.659 1.591l9.581 9.581c.699.699 1.78.872 2.607.33a18.095 18.095 0 0 0 5.223-5.223c.542-.827.369-1.908-.33-2.607L11.16 3.66A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 9.568 3Z" />
                  <path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M6 6h.008v.008H6V6Z" />
                </svg>
                {d.discount_name}
              </span>
              <span [-className="text-emerald-400-]{+className="text-accent+} font-mono shrink-0">-{fmt(d.total_savings)}</span>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ── E. Purchase Limit Gauge ── */}
      <div className="shrink-0 px-4 py-2">
        <PurchaseLimitGauge limit={purchaseLimit} />
      </div>

      {/* ── F. Totals ── */}
      <div className="shrink-0 px-4 py-3 border-t [-border-gray-800">-]{+border-edge">+}
        <div className="flex justify-between mb-1">
          <span className="text-xs [-text-gray-500">Subtotal</span>-]{+text-muted">Subtotal</span>+}
          <span className="text-sm [-text-gray-200-]{+text-primary+} tabular-nums font-mono">{fmt(subtotal)}</span>
        </div>
        {discountTotal > 0 && (
          <div className="flex justify-between mb-1">
            <span className="text-xs [-text-emerald-400">Discounts</span>-]{+text-accent">Discounts</span>+}
            <span className="text-sm [-text-emerald-400-]{+text-accent+} tabular-nums font-mono">-{fmt(discountTotal)}</span>
          </div>
        )}
        <div className="flex justify-between mb-1">
          <span className="text-xs [-text-gray-500">Tax</span>-]{+text-muted">Tax</span>+}
          <span className="text-sm [-text-gray-200-]{+text-primary+} tabular-nums font-mono">{fmt(taxTotal)}</span>
        </div>
        <div className="border-t [-border-gray-700-]{+border-edge+} pt-2 mt-1 flex justify-between">
          <span className="text-base font-bold [-text-gray-50">TOTAL</span>-]{+text-primary">TOTAL</span>+}
          <span className="text-base font-bold [-text-gray-50-]{+text-primary+} tabular-nums font-mono">{fmt(total)}</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* ── G. Action Buttons ── */}
      <div className="shrink-0 px-4 py-3 flex gap-2.5">
        <button
          disabled={items.length === 0}
          onClick={handleVoidClick}
          className="flex-1 h-12 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-150 active:scale-[0.97] disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed [-bg-gray-800-]{+bg-surface+} border [-border-gray-700 text-gray-400 hover:bg-red-500/10 hover:border-red-500/40 hover:text-red-400"-]{+border-edge text-secondary hover:bg-danger/10 hover:border-danger/40 hover:text-danger"+}
        >
          VOID
        </button>
        <button
          disabled={items.length === 0 || heldCarts.length >= 10}
          onClick={handleHoldClick}
          className="flex-1 h-12 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all duration-150 active:scale-[0.97] disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed [-bg-amber-500/10-]{+bg-warning/10+} border [-border-amber-500/30 text-amber-400 hover:bg-amber-500/20"-]{+border-warning/30 text-warning hover:bg-warning/20"+}
        >
          HOLD
        </button>
        {drawer ? (
          <button
            disabled={!canPay}
            onClick={() => setShowCheckout(true)}
            className="flex-1 h-12 rounded-xl text-sm font-semibold transition-all duration-150 active:scale-[0.97] disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed [-bg-emerald-600 text-white hover:bg-emerald-500-]{+bg-accent text-primary hover:bg-accent+} shadow-lg [-shadow-emerald-900/30"-]{+shadow-accent/30"+}
          >
            PAY
          </button>
        ) : (
          <button
            onClick={() => setShowOpenDrawer(true)}
            className="flex-1 h-12 rounded-xl text-sm font-semibold transition-all duration-150 active:scale-[0.97] [-bg-emerald-600 text-white hover:bg-emerald-500-]{+bg-accent text-primary hover:bg-accent+} shadow-lg [-shadow-emerald-900/30"-]{+shadow-accent/30"+}
          >
            Open Drawer
          </button>
        )}
      </div>
    </aside>
  )
}

  }, [items, customerId, customerType, locationId, registerId, cashDrawerId, tenderedAmount, manualDiscountIds, clearCart, onClose])

              <path d="M4 4l8 8M12 4l-8 8" />
            </svg>
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Item count + customer */}
        <p className="text-sm [-text-gray-500-]{+text-muted+} px-6 pt-3">
          {items.length} item{items.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}
          {customerId ? ' \u00b7 Customer attached' : ''}
        </p>

        {/* Total Due */}
      <div className="mx-6 mt-4 [-bg-[#0a0a0b]-]{+bg-bg+} rounded-xl p-6 text-center">
          <p className="text-xs [-text-gray-600-]{+text-muted+} uppercase tracking-widest font-mono">Total Due</p>
          <p className="text-5xl font-bold [-text-gray-50-]{+text-primary+} tabular-nums font-mono tracking-tight mt-1">
            {fmt(total)}
          </p>
        </div>

        {/* Cash Tendered */}
        <div className="mx-6 mt-5">
          <label className="block text-xs [-text-gray-500-]{+text-muted+} mb-1.5">Cash Tendered</label>
          <input
            type="number"
            step="0.01"
            value={tendered}
            onChange={(e) => setTendered(e.target.value)}
            autoFocus
            className="w-full h-16 text-3xl text-center [-bg-[#0a0a0b]-]{+bg-bg+} border-2 [-border-gray-800 focus:border-emerald-500-]{+border-edge focus:border-accent+} rounded-xl font-mono tabular-nums [-text-gray-50-]{+text-primary+} outline-none transition-colors"
            placeholder="0.00"
          />
        </div>

        {/* Quick Amount Buttons */}
        <div className="px-6 mt-4 grid grid-cols-4 gap-2">
          {QUICK_AMOUNTS.map((amt) => (
            <button
              key={amt}
              onClick={() => handleQuick(amt)}
              className="h-11 rounded-lg [-bg-gray-800-]{+bg-surface+} border [-border-gray-700/50 text-gray-300-]{+border-edge/50 text-secondary+} text-sm font-medium [-hover:bg-gray-700 hover:border-gray-600-]{+hover:bg-raised hover:border-edge-strong+} transition-all"
            >
              ${amt}
            </button>
          ))}
          <button
            onClick={handleExact}
            className="col-span-2 h-11 rounded-lg [-bg-emerald-500/10-]{+bg-accent/10+} border [-border-emerald-500/30 text-emerald-400-]{+border-accent/30 text-accent+} text-sm font-medium [-hover:bg-emerald-500/20-]{+hover:bg-accent/20+} transition-all"
          >
            Exact
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Change Due */}
        {tenderedAmount > 0 && tenderedAmount >= total && (
          <div className="mx-6 mt-4 text-center">
            <p className="text-xs [-text-gray-600">Change-]{+text-muted">Change+} Due</p>
            <p className="text-3xl font-bold [-text-emerald-400-]{+text-accent+} font-mono tabular-nums mt-0.5">
              {fmt(changeDue)}
            </p>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Error */}
        {error && (
          <p className="mx-6 mt-3 text-sm [-text-red-400-]{+text-danger+} text-center">{error}</p>
        )}

        {/* Complete Button */}
        <div className="mx-6 mt-5 mb-6">
          <button
            onClick={handleComplete}
            disabled={!canComplete}
            className="w-full h-14 rounded-xl [-bg-emerald-600 text-white-]{+bg-accent text-primary+} text-lg font-bold [-hover:bg-emerald-500-]{+hover:bg-accent+} disabled:opacity-20 disabled:cursor-not-allowed active:scale-[0.98] transition-all shadow-lg [-shadow-emerald-900/40"-]{+shadow-accent/40"+}
          >
            {isProcessing ? 'Processing...' : 'Complete Sale'}
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

    if (!closedRef.current) {
      closedRef.current = true
      clearCart()
      onClose()
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 [-bg-black/90-]{+bg-bg/90+} backdrop-blur-sm z-50 flex items-center justify-center">
      <div [-className="bg-gray-900-]{+className="bg-bg+} border [-border-gray-800-]{+border-edge+} rounded-2xl w-full max-w-lg shadow-2xl py-10 px-8 text-center">
        {/* Checkmark */}
        <svg
          className="w-16 h-16 [-text-emerald-400-]{+text-accent+} mx-auto"
          viewBox="0 0 64 64"
          fill="none"
          stroke="currentColor"
          strokeWidth="3"
          strokeLinecap="round"
          strokeLinejoin="round"
        >
          <circle cx="32" cy="32" r="28" [-className="text-emerald-400/20"-]{+className="text-accent/20"+} />
          <path d="M20 33l8 8 16-16" />
        </svg>

        <p className="text-lg [-text-gray-300-]{+text-secondary+} font-medium mt-4">Sale Complete</p>
        <p className="text-sm [-text-gray-500-]{+text-muted+} font-mono mt-1">
          Transaction #{result.transactionNumber}
        </p>

        {/* Change Due */}
        {result.changeDue > 0 && (
          <div className="mt-6">
            <p className="text-xs [-text-gray-600-]{+text-muted+} uppercase tracking-widest">Change Due</p>
            <p className="text-5xl font-bold [-text-emerald-400-]{+text-accent+} font-mono tabular-nums mt-1">
              {fmt(result.changeDue)}
            </p>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* New Sale */}
        <button
          onClick={handleNewSale}
          className="mt-8 h-12 w-full max-w-xs mx-auto rounded-xl [-bg-gray-800-]{+bg-surface+} border [-border-gray-700 text-gray-200-]{+border-edge text-primary+} font-medium [-hover:bg-gray-700-]{+hover:bg-raised+} transition-colors block"
        >
          New Sale
        </button>

        {/* Countdown */}
        <p className="text-xs [-text-gray-600-]{+text-muted+} mt-3">
          Auto-closing in {Math.max(countdown, 0)}s
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

### scripts/check-theme.mjs
    1: import { readFile, readdir } from 'node:fs/promises'
    2: import { extname, join, resolve, sep } from 'node:path'
    3: 
    4: const root = process.cwd()
    5: const sourceRoots = ['src/app', 'src/components']
    6: const extensions = new Set(['.ts', '.tsx', '.js', '.jsx', '.css'])
    7: const globalsPath = 'src/app/globals.css'
    8: const palettePattern = /(?:^|[^a-zA-Z0-9_-])((?:[a-z0-9-]+:)*(?:bg|text|border|ring|outline|divide|from|via|to|fill|stroke|shadow|placeholder)-(?:gray|zinc|slate|neutral|stone|red|green|emerald|blue|amber|purple)(?:-\d{2,3})?(?:\/\d+)?|(?:[a-z0-9-]+:)*(?:bg|text|border|ring|outline|divide|from|via|to|fill|stroke|shadow)-(?:black|white)(?:\/\d+)?)/gi
    9: const hexPattern = /(?<!&)#(?:[\da-f]{8}|[\da-f]{6}|[\da-f]{4}|[\da-f]{3})(?![\da-f])/gi
   10: 
   11: function normalize(path) {
   12:   return path.split(sep).join('/')
   13: }
   14: 
   15: async function walk(directory) {
   16:   const entries = await readdir(resolve(root, directory), { withFileTypes: true })
   17:   const nested = await Promise.all(entries.map(entry => {
   18:     const path = join(directory, entry.name)
   19:     if (entry.isDirectory()) return walk(path)
   20:     return extensions.has(extname(entry.name)) ? [normalize(path)] : []
   21:   }))
   22:   return nested.flat()
   23: }
   24: 
   25: async function loadExemptions() {
   26:   const source = await readFile(resolve(root, '.route/theme-exemptions.txt'), 'utf8')
   27:   const exemptions = new Map()
   28:   for (const rawLine of source.split(/\r?\n/)) {
   29:     const line = rawLine.trim()
   30:     if (!line || line.startsWith('#')) continue
   31:     const [path, justification] = line.split('|').map(part => part.trim())
   32:     if (!path || !justification) throw new Error(`Malformed theme exemption: ${rawLine}`)
   33:     exemptions.set(normalize(path), justification)
   34:   }
   35:   return exemptions
   36: }
   37: 
   38: function lineAt(source, index) {
   39:   return source.slice(0, index).split('\n').length
   40: }
   41: 
   42: function parseTheme(css, id) {
   43:   const block = css.match(new RegExp(`\\[data-theme=["']${id}["']\\]\\s*\\{([\\s\\S]*?)\\}`))
   44:   if (!block) throw new Error(`Missing CSS block for ${id}`)
   45:   return Object.fromEntries([...block[1].matchAll(/--([a-z0-9-]+):\s*(#[\da-f]{6})\s*;/gi)].map(match => [match[1], match[2]]))
   46: }
   47: 
   48: function luminance(hex) {
   49:   const channels = [1, 3, 5].map(start => Number.parseInt(hex.slice(start, start + 2), 16) / 255)
   50:     .map(value => value <= 0.04045 ? value / 12.92 : ((value + 0.055) / 1.055) ** 2.4)
   51:   return 0.2126 * channels[0] + 0.7152 * channels[1] + 0.0722 * channels[2]
   52: }
   53: 
   54: function contrast(first, second) {
   55:   const [lighter, darker] = [luminance(first), luminance(second)].sort((a, b) => b - a)
   56:   return (lighter + 0.05) / (darker + 0.05)
   57: }
   58: 
   59: const exemptions = await loadExemptions()
   60: const files = (await Promise.all(sourceRoots.map(walk))).flat()
   61: const findings = []
   62: 
   63: for (const path of files) {
   64:   const source = await readFile(resolve(root, path), 'utf8')
   65:   for (const match of source.matchAll(palettePattern)) {
   66:     findings.push(`${path}:${lineAt(source, match.index ?? 0)} palette utility ${match[1]}`)
   67:   }
   68:   if (!exemptions.has(path)) {
   69:     for (const match of source.matchAll(hexPattern)) {
   70:       const line = source.slice(source.lastIndexOf('\n', match.index) + 1, source.indexOf('\n', match.index)).trim()
   71:       const isTokenDefinition = path === globalsPath && line.startsWith('--')
   72:       if (!isTokenDefinition) findings.push(`${path}:${lineAt(source, match.index ?? 0)} hex literal ${match[0]}`)
   73:     }
   74:   }
   75: }
   76: 
   77: for (const path of exemptions.keys()) {
   78:   try {
   79:     await readFile(resolve(root, path), 'utf8')
   80:   } catch {
   81:     findings.push(`Stale exemption references missing file: ${path}`)
   82:   }
   83: }
   84: 
   85: const css = await readFile(resolve(root, globalsPath), 'utf8')
   86: const contrastPairs = [
   87:   ['text-primary', 'bg'], ['text-primary', 'surface'], ['text-primary', 'surface-raised'], ['text-primary', 'surface-overlay'],
   88:   ['text-secondary', 'bg'], ['text-secondary', 'surface'], ['text-secondary', 'surface-raised'], ['text-secondary', 'surface-overlay'],
   89:   ['text-muted', 'bg'], ['text-muted', 'surface'], ['text-muted', 'surface-raised'], ['text-muted', 'surface-overlay'],
   90:   ['text-inverse', 'success'], ['text-inverse', 'warning'], ['text-inverse', 'danger'], ['text-inverse', 'info'],
   91:   ['accent-fg', 'accent'], ['success', 'success-soft'],
   92:   ['warning', 'warning-soft'], ['danger', 'danger-soft'], ['info', 'info-soft'],
   93: ]
   94: 
   95: console.log('Theme contrast ratios (WCAG AA normal text >= 4.50):')
   96: for (const id of ['oasis-dark', 'oasis-light', 'oasis-contrast']) {
   97:   const tokens = parseTheme(css, id)
   98:   const results = contrastPairs.map(([foreground, background]) => {
   99:     const ratio = contrast(tokens[foreground], tokens[background])
  100:     if (ratio < 4.5) findings.push(`${id}: --${foreground} / --${background} contrast ${ratio.toFixed(2)} < 4.50`)
  101:     return `${foreground}/${background}=${ratio.toFixed(2)}`
  102:   })
  103:   console.log(`  ${id}: ${results.join(', ')}`)
  104: }
  105: 
  106: if (findings.length) {
  107:   console.error(`\nTheme gate failed with ${findings.length} finding(s):`)
  108:   findings.forEach(finding => console.error(`- ${finding}`))
  109:   process.exit(1)
  110: }
  111: 
  112: console.log(`Theme gate passed across ${files.length} files with ${exemptions.size} documented exemptions.`)
### src/lib/theme/bootstrap.tsx
    1: import { DEFAULT_THEME, THEMES, THEME_COOKIE_NAME, THEME_STORAGE_KEY } from './registry'
    2: 
    3: const allowedThemes = JSON.stringify(THEMES.map(theme => theme.id))
    4: 
    5: export const THEME_INIT_SCRIPT = `(() => {
    6:   const allowed = ${allowedThemes};
    7:   const fallback = ${JSON.stringify(DEFAULT_THEME)};
    8:   let stored = '';
    9:   try { stored = localStorage.getItem(${JSON.stringify(THEME_STORAGE_KEY)}) || ''; } catch {}
   10:   const cookie = document.cookie.split('; ').find((entry) => entry.startsWith(${JSON.stringify(`${THEME_COOKIE_NAME}=`)}));
   11:   const persisted = stored || (cookie ? decodeURIComponent(cookie.split('=').slice(1).join('=')) : '');
   12:   document.documentElement.dataset.theme = allowed.includes(persisted) ? persisted : fallback;
   13: })()`
   14: 
   15: export function ThemeBootstrap() {
   16:   return <script id="oasis-theme-bootstrap" dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: THEME_INIT_SCRIPT }} />
   17: }

codex
The theme gate passes, but it proves token definitions and absence of a limited palette list, not correct token use. Two systemic defects remain: 164 changed accent controls use `text-primary` instead of the supplied `text-accent-fg`, producing measured contrast ratios of 1.91 to 3.06 across shipped themes; and hundreds of former hover shades were collapsed to the same base token. I’m running the focused suites now, then I’ll reconcile each candidate against what the tests actually cover.

   19:   const [now] = useState(() => Date.now())
   20: 
   21:   const fetchOrders = () => {
   22:     fetch(`/api/orders?location_id=${locationId}`)
   23:       .then(r => r.json())
   24:       .then(d => setOrders((d.orders ?? []).filter((o: Order) => ['pending', 'confirmed', 'preparing', 'ready'].includes(o.status))))
   25:   }
   26: 
   27:   useEffect(() => { fetchOrders(); const iv = setInterval(fetchOrders, 15000); return () => clearInterval(iv) }, [locationId])
   28: 
   29:   const advanceStatus = async (orderId: string, currentStatus: string) => {
   30:     const next = NEXT_STATUS[currentStatus]
   31:     if (!next) return
   32:     await fetch(`/api/orders/${orderId}`, { method: 'PATCH', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ status: next }) })
   33:     fetchOrders()
   34:   }
   35: 
   36:   return (
   37:     <div className="bg-surface rounded-xl border border-edge p-4">
   38:       <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-secondary uppercase mb-3">Online Orders ({orders.length})</h3>
   39: 
   40:       {orders.length === 0 ? (
   41:         <p className="text-muted text-sm">No active orders</p>
   42:       ) : (
   43:         <div className="space-y-2 max-h-80 overflow-y-auto">
   44:           {orders.map((o: Order) => {
   45:             const pickupMs = new Date(o.pickup_time).getTime() - now
   46:             const urgency = pickupMs < 0 ? 'border-danger' : pickupMs < 30 * 60000 ? 'border-yellow-500' : 'border-edge'
   47:             const nextStatus = NEXT_STATUS[o.status]
   48: 
   49:             return (
   50:               <div key={o.id} className={`border rounded-lg p-3 ${urgency}`}>
   51:                 <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
   52:                   <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   53:                     <span className={`text-[10px] font-bold px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-primary ${STATUS_COLORS[o.status] ?? 'bg-raised'}`}>
   54:                       {o.status.toUpperCase()}
   55:                     </span>
   56:                     <span className="text-sm text-primary font-medium">{o.customer_name}</span>
   57:                   </div>
   58:                   <span className="text-xs text-secondary">
   59:                     {new Date(o.pickup_time).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: 'numeric', minute: '2-digit' })}
   60:                   </span>
   61:                 </div>
   62:                 <p className="text-xs text-secondary">{o.customer_phone}</p>
   63:                 {nextStatus && (
   64:                   <button onClick={() => advanceStatus(o.id, o.status)}
   65:                     className="mt-2 text-xs px-2 py-1 bg-accent text-primary rounded hover:bg-accent transition-colors">
   66:                     Mark {nextStatus}
   67:                   </button>
   68:                 )}
   69:               </div>
   70:             )
   71:           })}
   72:         </div>
   73:       )}
   74:     </div>
   75:   )
   76: }

 import { NextResponse } from 'next/server'
 import { createSupabaseServerClient } from '@/lib/supabase/server'
 import { seedBioTrackConfig, clearBioTrackConfigCache } from '@/lib/biotrack/configLoader'
 import { logger } from '@/lib/utils/logger'
+import { requireSession, type SessionPayload } from '@/lib/auth/session'
+import { AppError } from '@/lib/utils/errors'
+
+async function requireBioTrackAdmin(): Promise<SessionPayload> {
+  const session = await requireSession()
+  if (session.role !== 'admin' && session.role !== 'owner') {
+    throw new AppError('FORBIDDEN', 'Administrator access required', undefined, 403)
+  }
+  return session
+}
+
+function authError(err: unknown): NextResponse | null {
+  if (err && typeof err === 'object' && 'code' in err) {
+    const appErr = err as { message?: string; statusCode?: number }
+    return NextResponse.json({ error: appErr.message ?? 'Access denied' }, { status: appErr.statusCode ?? 500 })
+  }
+  return null
+}
 
 /**
  * GET /api/biotrack/config?locationId=xxx
  * Returns the BioTrack config for a location (credentials redacted).
  */
 export async function GET(request: Request) {
   const { searchParams } = new URL(request.url)
   const locationId = searchParams.get('locationId')
 
   if (!locationId) {
     return NextResponse.json({ error: 'locationId is required' }, { status: 400 })
   }
 
   try {
+    const session = await requireBioTrackAdmin()
     const sb = await createSupabaseServerClient()
     const { data, error } = await sb
       .from('biotrack_config')
-      .select('*')
+      .select('location_id, xml_api_url, rest_api_url, ubi, biotrack_location_id, use_training_mode, use_allotment_check, use_lab_data, default_labs_in_receive, locations!inner(organization_id)')
       .eq('location_id', locationId)
+      .eq('locations.organization_id', session.organizationId)
       .single()
 
     if (error || !data) {
       return NextResponse.json({ error: 'No config found for this location' }, { status: 404 })
     }
 
-    // Redact credentials in response
-    // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
-    const safe = { ...(data as any) }
-    if (safe.username_encrypted) safe.username_encrypted = '***'
-    if (safe.password_encrypted) safe.password_encrypted = '***'
-
+    const { locations: _locations, ...safe } = data
     return NextResponse.json({ config: safe })
   } catch (err) {
+    const response = authError(err)
+    if (response) return response
     logger.error('Failed to get BioTrack config', { locationId, error: String(err) })
     return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Internal server error' }, { status: 500 })
   }
 }
 
 /**
  * POST /api/biotrack/config
  * Creates or updates BioTrack config for a location.
  * Body: { locationId, xmlApiUrl, restApiUrl, username, password, ubi, ...toggles }
  */
 export async function POST(request: Request) {
   try {
+    const session = await requireBioTrackAdmin()
     const body = await request.json()
 
     const { locationId, xmlApiUrl, restApiUrl, username, password, ubi, ...toggles } = body
 
     if (!locationId || !restApiUrl || !username || !password) {
       return NextResponse.json(
         { error: 'locationId, restApiUrl, username, and password are required' },
         { status: 400 },
       )
     }
 
+    const sb = await createSupabaseServerClient()
+    const { data: location, error: locationError } = await sb.from('locations')
+      .select('id')
+      .eq('id', locationId)
+      .eq('organization_id', session.organizationId)
+      .maybeSingle()
+
+    if (locationError) return NextResponse.json({ error: locationError.message }, { status: 500 })
+    if (!location) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Location not found' }, { status: 404 })
+
     await seedBioTrackConfig({
       locationId,
       xmlApiUrl: xmlApiUrl ?? '',
       restApiUrl,
       username,
       password,
       ubi: ubi ?? '',
+      biotrackLocationId: toggles.biotrackLocationId ?? '',
       useTrainingMode: toggles.useTrainingMode,
       useAllotmentCheck: toggles.useAllotmentCheck,
       useLabData: toggles.useLabData,
       defaultLabsInReceive: toggles.defaultLabsInReceive,
     })
 
     return NextResponse.json({ success: true, message: 'BioTrack config saved' })
   } catch (err) {
+    const response = authError(err)
+    if (response) return response
     logger.error('Failed to save BioTrack config', { error: String(err) })
     return NextResponse.json({ error: String(err) }, { status: 500 })
   }
 }

+

+      .select('id')

+      .eq('organization_id', session.organizationId)
+      .maybeSingle()

+    return NextResponse.json({ success: true, message: 'Cache cleared' })
+  } catch (err) {
+    const response = authError(err)

+  }
 }

   try {
-    await requireSession()
+    const session = await requireDutchieManager()
     const sb = await createSupabaseServerClient()
 
     const locationId = request.nextUrl.searchParams.get('location_id')
     const limit = Math.min(parseInt(request.nextUrl.searchParams.get('limit') ?? '50'), 100)
 
     // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any

-      .select('*')
+      .select('*, locations!inner(organization_id)')
+      .eq('locations.organization_id', session.organizationId)
       .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
       .limit(limit)
 
     if (locationId) {
       query = query.eq('location_id', locationId)
     }
 
     const { data, error } = await query
 
     if (error) {
       return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 })
     }
 
-    return NextResponse.json({ jobs: data ?? [] })
+    const jobs = (data ?? []).map(({ locations: _locations, ...job }: Record<string, unknown>) => job)
+    return NextResponse.json({ jobs })
   } catch (err) {

-      const a = err as { code: string; statusCode?: number }

+      if (a.code === 'UNAUTHORIZED' || a.code === 'FORBIDDEN') {
+        return NextResponse.json({ error: a.message ?? 'Access denied' }, { status: a.statusCode ?? 403 })
+      }
     }
     logger.error('Dutchie jobs GET error', { error: String(err) })
     return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Server error' }, { status: 500 })
   }

diff --git a/src/app/api/reconciliation/manual/route.ts b/src/app/api/reconciliation/manual/route.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..635abd2
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/app/api/reconciliation/manual/route.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
+import { requireSession } from '@/lib/auth/session'
+import { createSupabaseServerClient } from '@/lib/supabase/server'
+import { runDailyReconciliation } from '@/lib/services/reconciliationService'
+import { logger } from '@/lib/utils/logger'
+
+export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
+  try {
+    const session = await requireSession()
+    const { location_id: locationId } = await request.json() as { location_id?: string }
+    if (!locationId) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'location_id required' }, { status: 400 })
+
+    const sb = await createSupabaseServerClient()
+    const { data: location } = await sb
+      .from('locations')
+      .select('id')
+      .eq('id', locationId)
+      .eq('organization_id', session.organizationId)
+      .maybeSingle()
+    if (!location) return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Location not found' }, { status: 404 })
+
+    const report = await runDailyReconciliation(locationId, session.employeeId)
+    return NextResponse.json({ report })
+  } catch (err) {
+    logger.error('Manual reconciliation error', { error: String(err) })
+    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Server error' }, { status: 500 })
+  }
+}
